zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Bacon於大約1465年出生在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普時，她的父親Thomas Bacon39歲，母親Margery Jenny33歲。她於1487年與Edmund Daundye在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年1月15日在英國素福爾可簡頓享年93歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可簡頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Bacon于大约1465年出生在英国諾福爾可巴根斯索普时，她的父亲Thomas Bacon39岁，母亲Margery Jenny33岁。她于1487年与Edmund Daundye在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年1月15日在英国素福爾可簡頓享年93岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可簡頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bacon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Norman French personal name Bacun, derived from the ancient Germanic name Bac(c)o, Bahho, based on the element bag ‘(to) fight, (to) dispute’. The name was relatively common among the Normans in the form Bacus, of which the oblique case was Bacon.

English and French: from Middle English, Old French bacun, bacon ‘bacon’ (a word of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Back 3), probably a metonymic occupational name for a preparer and seller of cured pork.

History: Gilles Bacon from Normandy, France, is documented in Quebec City, QC, in 1647. — Michael Bacon from England arrived in Dedham, MA, in 1640. Nathanial Bacon, from Stratton, Cornwall, arrived in Barnstaple, MA, in 1639. Another Nathaniel Bacon (1647–76), from Friston Hall, Suffolk, emigrated to VA and settled at Curl's Neck on the James river.

variants.name: Bagg
meanings: from Middle English bagge ‘bag, pack, bundle’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of bags and sacks of various kinds, including wallets and purses. It might also have been used for a beggar, or for one who carried their belongings in a bag.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Bago (Bac(c)o, Bahho), from the root bag- ‘to fight’ (see Bacon 2).

variants.name: Back
meanings: English (Devon, Kent, Sussex, and Norfolk): from the Middle English personal name Bakke (Old English Bacca). It is of uncertain origin, but may have been a byname in the same sense as 3.
English: nickname from Middle English bakke ‘bat’, of uncertain application, perhaps a nickname for a person with poor eyesight, from the expression ‘blind as a bat’.

English: from Middle English bakke ‘back’ (Old English bæc), hence a nickname for someone with a hunched back or some other noticeable peculiarity of the back or spine, or a topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or ridge, or at the rear of a settlement.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Bacon was born about 1465, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas Bacon, was 39 and her mother, Margery Jenny, was 33. She married Edmund Daundye in 1487, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 15 January 1557, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, at the age of 93, and was buried in Kenton, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Bacon est née environ 1465, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bacon, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margery Jenny, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Daundye en 1487, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 janvier 1557, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterrée à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Bacon um 1465 in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bacon 39 und ihre Mutter Margery Jenny 33. Sie hat 1487 in England Edmund Daundye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Januar 1557 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Kenton, Suffolk, England und wurde in Kenton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Bacon è nata il circa 1465 nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Bacon, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margery Jenny, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Daundye nel 1487, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 gennaio 1557, nel Kenton, Suffolk, England, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolta a Kenton, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Baconが約1465年にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペで生まれた時，父Thomas Baconは39歳，母Margery Jennyは33歳であった。1487年にイギリスでEdmund Daundyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年1月15日にイギリススフォルクケントンで93歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクケントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Bacon(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bacon(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Jenny(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1487년 영국에서 Edmund Daundye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 1월 15일 영국 수폴크 켄턴에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 켄턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Bacon nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bacon, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margery Jenny, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Daundye em 1487, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1557, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 93 anos, e foi sepultada em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Bacon родилась около 1465 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bacon было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Jenny, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Daundye в 1487 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 января 1557 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 93 лет и была похоронена в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Bacon nació aproximadamente 1465, en Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Bacon, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margery Jenny, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Edmund Daundye en 1487, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de enero de 1557, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultada en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
